zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Janet Somerville於1423年出生在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾艾特利可時，她的父親William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville31歲，母親Johanna Janet Mowat27歲。她於1444年與Sir David Buccleuch Scott在英國蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾艾特利可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1492年3月在蘇格蘭雷福福爾可洛素利享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Janet Somerville于1423年出生在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾艾特利可时，她的父亲William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville31岁，母亲Johanna Janet Mowat27岁。她于1444年与Sir David Buccleuch Scott在英国苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾艾特利可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1492年3月在苏格兰雷福福爾可洛素利享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Janet Somerville was born in 1423, in Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Scotland, her father, William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville, was 31 and her mother, Johanna Janet Mowat, was 27. She married Sir David Buccleuch Scott in 1444, in Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in March 1492, in Crosslee, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Janet Somerville est née en 1423, à Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Écosse, son père, William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Johanna Janet Mowat, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir David Buccleuch Scott en 1444, à Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1492, à Crosslee, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Janet Somerville 1423 in Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville 31 und ihre Mutter Johanna Janet Mowat 27. Sie hat 1444 in Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir David Buccleuch Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1492 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Crosslee, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Somervilleが1423年にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアエットリックで生まれた時，父William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommervilleは31歳，母Johanna Janet Mowatは27歳であった。1444年にイギリススコットランドセルキルクシュアイアエットリックでSir David Buccleuch Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1492年3月にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアクロスリーで69歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Somerville(이)가 1423년 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 트릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Janet Mowat(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 스코틀랜드 셀커크실르 트릭에서 Sir David Buccleuch Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 3월 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 크로슬리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir David Buccleuch Scott em 1444, em Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Janet Somerville родилась в 1423 г. в местности эттрикк, селкиркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Johanna Janet Mowat, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir David Buccleuch Scott в 1444 г. в местности эттрикк, селкиркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла марта 1492 г. в местности кроссли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con Sir David Buccleuch Scott en 1444, en Ettrick, Selkirkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1492, en Crosslee, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
